content:
I had a broken Antora installation. With the reinstall I have moved to version 3.0.1 of Antora. A local build of the manual for a plugin (nvc_pi) worked fine although I needed to use the command line: 

$ npx antora --stacktrace site.yml
Right. But is --stacktrace really required to make it build? Seems strange if so.
No --stacktrace is not required. Just added it when I was sorting problems with my asciidoc setup.
This topic was moved here from #general > Antora version by Alec Leamas.
